strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_COMPLETION_UNLOCKAB: Ut HUNK, perfice ludum aut dele.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_CQC_ACHIEVEMENT_ID_: Ut HUNK, fac 10 felices contra-impugnationes in uno Stadio.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_FLAMER_ACHIEVEMENT_: Ut HUNK, plene meliora Chemicum Flammasium.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_INFINITEKNIFE_ACHIE: Ut HUNK, porta duo Claves Cardinales Picas simul.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_JUMPPACK_ACHIEVEMEN: Ut HUNK, fias victima infortunii cum parasuete.
HUNK: Nowhere to Go But Up
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_LIGHTWEIGHT_ACHIEVE: Ut HUNK, perfice Stadium 1 sine rebus.\n<color=#8888>(Arma et instrumenta contra te non computantur)</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_MACHETE_UNLOCKABLE_: Ut HUNK, perfice Stadium sine pugnando ullo arma.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_MONSOON_UNLOCKABLE_: Ut HUNK, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_ROOKIE_ACHIEVEMENT_: HUNK: First Day on the Job
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_SUPPORTER_ACHIEVEME: Lude ut HUNK ante officialem editionem.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_SURVIVALKIT_ACHIEVE: Ut HUNK, exhauri tela in Commencement.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_TYPHOON_UNLOCKABLE_: Ut HUNK, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut Eclipse.\n<color=#8888>(Quisque difficultas Typhoon aut superior computatur)</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HUNK_WESKERKNIFE_UNLOCKA: Ut HUNK, meliora arma cum novo accessori.
strings.PRIMARY_CQC_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Aequum.</style> <style=cIsDamage>Pulsa</style> proelii propinqui pugnatores pro <style=cIsDamage>200% et 250% vulneris</style>, inferens <style=cIsHealth>Mangled</style>.
strings.ROB_ARTIFACT_CONTAMINATION_DESC: Quisque lusor accipit casu eventum Viri quoque Stadio.
strings.ROB_ARTIFACT_PURSUER_DESC: Lusores incipiunt cursu cum S.T.A.R.S. Insigni.
strings.ROB_ARTIFACT_STRIKETEAM_DESC: Lusores quandoque habebunt Exercitus Ictus missos ad eos neutralizandos.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_DESCRIPTION: HUNK est elitarius infiltrator qui portat magnum arsenal armorum adeptum per OSP (In Situ Procuratio).
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_FLAMERPASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Incipe <style=cIsHealth>SOLUM</style> cum <style=cIsDamage>Chimico Flammasio</style>. Potes <style=cIsDamage>colligere</style> <style=cIsUtility>archas</style> pro tela. <style=cIsHealth>Solum UNUM theca armorum gignitur per Stadium.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_BLOODY_DESCRIPTION: Lamina sanguinolenta cum margine serrata quae iam laceravit multos adversarios.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_DEFAULT_DESCRIPTION: Culter militaris normalis. Certe utilis in locis strictis.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_HIDDEN_DESCRIPTION: Lamina humilis profile retractabilis in manicis abscondita. Idealis ad operationes furtivas.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_HOTDOGGER_DESCRIPTIO: Sicut nomen indicat, hic culter anti-biologici belli ab Umbrella evolutus ab his qui iactare amant utitur.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_INFINITE_DESCRIPTION: Culter militaris specialiter tractatus ad incredibilem gradum duratus. Dicitur factus esse ut vere duret.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_KITCHEN_DESCRIPTION: Culter factus ad coquinandum. Lama eius facile fragitur.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_MACHETE_DESCRIPTION: Enormis lamina primo intenta ad tactics partisana.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_KNIFE_WESKER_DESCRIPTION: Lamina crudelis cum margine serrata ad iuvandum lacerandum adversarios tuos.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, humana unitas nunc neutralizata.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Incipe cum <style=cIsDamage>LE 5</style> et <style=cIsDamage>armis secundariis</style>. Potes <style=cIsDamage>colligere</style> <style=cIsUtility>archas</style> pro tela.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_PASSIVE2_DESCRIPTION: Incipe cum <style=cIsDamage>pleno arsenal</style>, <style=cIsHealth>SED</style> iam non potes <style=cIsHealth>adipisci addita tela</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_PPASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: HUNK potest colligere <color=#FFFF00>U.C. Claves Cardinales</color> ad aperiendas <style=cIsDamage>thecas armorum</style> et dilatandum arsenale suum.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_PPASSIVE2_DESCRIPTION: Primus <style=cIsHealth>dux</style> mori quoque Stadio dropat <style=cIsDamage>packagium copiarum</style> continens arma aut accessorium.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_PRIMARY_CQC_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Aequum.</style> <style=cIsDamage>Calca bis</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>200% et 250% vulneris</style>. Si <style=cIsUtility>secundus calcus</style> conectit, sequere cum <style=cIsDamage>Contra-impugnatione</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_RANDOMPASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Incipe cum <style=cIsDamage>LE 5</style> et <style=cIsDamage>armis secundariis</style>. Potes <style=cIsDamage>colligere</style> <style=cIsUtility>archas</style> pro tela. <style=cIsHealth>Tota contentio thecae armorum est casu.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SECONDARY_AIM_DESCRIPTION: Intende, <style=cIsUtility>detegens hostium debilitates</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Uti primo durant intentionem pugnat tua inscripta arma.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_AR_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>385% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_ATM_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>8 000% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Infligit plus vulnus in directis ictibus.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_ATM2_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>8 000% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Infligit plus vulnus in directis ictibus.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_BLUEROSE_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>2x3800% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_BROOMHC_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>180% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>25% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_COLT_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>2000% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_GOLDGUN_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>99 999% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_HOOKSHOT_DESCRIPTION: Puga uncum ad <style=cIsUtility>punctum remotum</style>, tunc <style=cIsUtility>trahe te ad eum</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Potes contra-impugnare post adventum.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_M19_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>500% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>100% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_M3_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>10x130% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_MAGNUM_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>1200% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_MINIGUN_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>2x250% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Vulnus scalatur cum celeritate impugnationis.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_MUP_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>320% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>25% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_REVOLVER_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>1200% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_RPG_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>8 000% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Infligit plus vulnus in directis ictibus.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_SG09_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>500% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_SHOTGUN_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>14x150% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_SLUGGER_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>3000% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_SMG_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>110% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>25% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_SPARKSHOT_DESCRIPTIO: Puga acus electrum pro <style=cIsDamage>1000% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Resilit ad usque 3 hostes pro <style=cIsDamage>2000% vulneris</style>.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_SSG_DESCRIPTION: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>16x200% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>50% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOOT_STREETSWEEPER_DESCRI: Pugnat pro <style=cIsDamage>14x24% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>25% capitis ictus boni.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SHOTGUNPASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Incipe cum <style=cIsDamage>W-870</style> et <style=cIsDamage>armis secundariis</style>. Potes <style=cIsDamage>colligere</style> <style=cIsUtility>archas</style> pro tela.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SMGPASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Incipe <style=cIsHealth>SOLUM</style> cum <style=cIsDamage>plenius meliorata LE 5</style>. Potes <style=cIsDamage>colligere</style> <style=cIsUtility>archas</style> pro tela. <style=cIsDamage>Specialis</style> substituitur per</style>0__Chaos Mode</style>1__.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SPECIAL_MAYHEM_DESCRIPTION: Ingredere <style=cIsDamage>Chaos Mode</style>, valde augens armorum perficienciam.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_SPECIAL_SWAP_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Muta</style> ad <style=cIsDamage>diversa arma</style>. Tange ad mutandum ad tua <style=cIsUtility>novissima arma usa</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_UTILITY_BASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Pulsa</style> proximos hostes cum umeris, <style=cIsUtility>stupefaciens eos</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>400% vulneris</style>. Si praeventive ad <style=cIsUtility>abrogandum impetum</style>, fac <style=cIsDamage>Deflexionem Perfectam</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_UTILITY_DODGE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Procede</style> brevem distantiam. Si praeventive ad <style=cIsUtility>vitandum impetum</style>, fac <style=cIsDamage>Evitationem Perfectam</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_UTILITY_DODGE_SCEPTER_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Procede</style> brevem distantiam. Si praeventive ad <style=cIsUtility>vitandum impetum</style>, fac <style=cIsDamage>Evitationem Perfectam</style>. Vis Urobori per te fluit.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_UTILITY_PARRY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Blocca</style> impetum, <style=cIsDamage>nullificans</style> vulnus et <style=cIsUtility>restituendo frigorationem</style>. Si praeventive, fac <style=cIsDamage>Parry Perfectam</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_BODY_WPASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Incipe <style=cIsHealth>SOLUM</style> cum <style=cIsDamage>armis secundariis</style>. Potes <style=cIsDamage>colligere</style> <style=cIsUtility>archas</style> pro tela. <style=cIsDamage>Utilitas</style> substituitur per</style>0__Uroboros</style>1__.
strings.ROB_HUNK_CONTAMINATION_ACHIEVEMENT_DESC: Trade exemplum viri ad Corporatio Umbrella.
strings.ROB_HUNK_CRYSTALSKULL_DESC: Rarus thesaurus. Potest mercari ad aliquod <style=cIsUtility>Caldarium</style> ut accipias rem.
strings.ROB_HUNK_INFROCKET_DESC: Iactor Rocketarum cum <style=cIsHealing>tela infinita</style>. Premium pro <color=#FFFF00>Early Supporter</color> consecutione.
strings.ROB_HUNK_ITEM_EFFECT_BANDOLIER: Fasciculi telorum recharge tuum magazinum cum <color=#00FF66>Tela Falsa</color>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_ITEM_EFFECT_BRAINSTALKS: Dum activus, pugnatio armis <style=cIsUtility>non consumit tela</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_ITEM_EFFECT_LUMINOUSSHOT: Acquire stackum post intendendum pro <style=cIsUtility>1 secunda</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Amittere omnes stackos post pugnam aut cessationem intentionis.</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_ITEM_EFFECT_PURITY: Duplicat <style=cIsUtility>magnitudinem magazini</style>. Consumptio telorum non mutatur.
strings.ROB_HUNK_JETPACK_DESC: Instrumentum factum ab Umbrella quod permittit te propellere te in quampiam directionem premendo saltum in aere.
strings.ROB_HUNK_KEYCARD_DESC: Adhibetur ad aperiendas <color=#C80202>thecas armorum</color> ab <style=cIsUtility>Corporatione Umbrella</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_KEYCARD_MASTER_DESC: Adhibetur ad aperiendas <color=#C80202>thecas armorum</color> ab <style=cIsUtility>Corporatione Umbrella</style>. Aperit <style=cIsHealing>omnes thecas</style> et convertit alias claves cardinales in <style=cIsUtility>scrapium</style>.
strings.ROB_HUNK_STARSBADGE_DESC: Insignis specialis a divisione virium specialium R.P.D., <color=#F20443>S.T.A.R.S.</color> <style=cIsHealth>Forsitan hoc capere fuit mala idea?</style>
strings.ROB_HUNK_STARSBADGE_DESCFULL: Quoque Stadio, specialis <color=#F20443>S.T.A.R.S.</color> archa gignitur quae solum aperiri potest utendo hoc insigne. Tamen, <style=cIsHealth>Nemesis Typus-T</style> te inconcusse venabitur.
strings.ROB_HUNK_STARSBADGE2_DESC: Adhibetur ad accedendam <style=cIsUtility>archam specialem</style> in quoque Stadio.
strings.ROB_HUNK_STARSBADGE2_DESCFULL: Quoque Stadio, specialis <color=#F20443>S.T.A.R.S.</color> archa gignitur quae solum aperiri potest utendo hoc insigne. Tamen, <style=cIsHealth>Nemesis Typus-T</style> te inconcusse venabitur.
strings.ROB_HUNK_SURVIVALKIT_DESC: Arsenalum superstitis quod auget et tuam facultatem telorum colligendorum et efficacitatem cultri tui.
strings.ROB_HUNK_TRANSCEIVER_DESC: Vocat contubernalem ad adiuvandum in operatione tua.
strings.ROB_HUNK_TYPEWRITER_DESC: Praebet <style=cIsUtility>2</style> additas <color=#C80202>archas armorum Umbrella</color> per Stadium.
strings.ROB_HUNK_WRISTBAND_DESC: Clavis electronica ad usum in structuris <color=#C80202>Corporationis Umbrella</color>. Adhibetur ad aperiendam <style=cIsUtility>archam armorum specialem</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_DASH_DESCRIPTION: Utere dum <style=cIsUtility>in aere</style> ad aero cursus <style=cIsDamage>semel</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Typus-T est arma biologica inarrestabilis aedificata ad sustinendum quamcumque poenae quantitatem et suos cussores facile neutralizandos.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_GRAB_DESCRIPTION: Cape hostem. Utere Primarium ad consumendum et sanandum 10% maximam valetudinem, aut Secundarium ad onerandum iactum usque ad 2400% vulneris.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_MELEE_DESCRIPTION: Punge pro <style=cIsDamage>350% vulneris</style>. Utere dum <style=cIsUtility>stans</style> ad calcandum pro <style=cIsDamage>800% vulneris</style>. Utere dum <style=cIsUtility>currit</style> ad umeri ictum pro <style=cIsDamage>600% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, humana unitas nunc neutralizata.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Vulnerare</style> condit <style=cIsHealth>Biomam</style>, augens tuum <style=cIsDamage>vulnus</style> cum plenum est. Saltus possunt esse <style=cIsDamage>onusti</style> pro <style=cIsUtility>potentibus saltibus</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_PASSIVE2_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Typus-T potest <style=cIsHealth>mutare</style> consumendo <style=cIsDamage>personas interesatas</style>, acquirens <style=cIsDamage>novas et melioratas peritias</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_PASSIVE22_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Impugnationes proelii propinqui</style> infligunt <style=cIsDamage>20%</style> plus vulneris, <style=isHealth>SED socii possunt accipere vulnus</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMESIS_BODY_ULTIMATE_DESCRIPTION: Tene ad lente consumendam <style=cIsHealth>Biomam</style>, restaurans usque ad <style=cIsHealing>100% maximam valetudinem</style>.
strings.SHOOT_BROOMHC_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>?agi</style>. Puga cum Broom HC, infligens <style=cIsDamage>180% vulneris</style>.
strings.SHOOT_GOLDGUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>?agi</style>. Puga cum sclopo aureo, infligens <style=cIsDamage>99.999% vulneris</style>.
strings.UTILITY_BASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Pelle</style> proximos hostes, <style=cIsUtility>stupefaciens eos</style>, infligens <style=cIsDamage>400% vulneris</style>. Si praeventive ad <style=cIsUtility>abrogandum impetum</style>, fac <style=cIsDamage>Deflexionem Perfectam</style>.
strings.UTILITY_DODGE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Move</style> brevem distantiam. Si praeventive ad <style=cIsUtility>vitandum impetum</style>, fac <style=cIsDamage>Evitationem Perfectam</style>.
strings.UTILITY_PARRY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Parry</style>, ad bloccandos impetus. Si praeventive ad <style=cIsUtility>vitandum impetum</style>, fac <style=cIsDamage>Evitationem Perfectam</style>.
